mapper.update: update forum_post set like_count = GREATEST(0, like_count + #{delta}), updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update forum_post set reply_count = GREATEST(0, reply_count + #{delta}), updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update forum_post set collect_count = GREATEST(0, collect_count + #{delta}), updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update forum_post set share_count = GREATEST(0, share_count + #{delta}), updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update forum_post set view_count = GREATEST(0, view_count + #{delta}), updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
